ab: Ci Kacaw ko ngangan no mako.
Ci Asing ko ngangan no mama^ no mako.
Ci Panay ko ngangan ni ina^ no mako.
Mo^tep to ko mihecaan no mako anini^ a mihecaan.
Ira ko kaka^ ako to fa’inayan, ci Kolas han ciira, safaw cecay to ko mihecaan niira.
ch: 我有一個哥哥，他叫kolas，他今年11歲。
en: I have a brother, his name is kolas, he is 11 years old.

ab: O malecaday ko picodadan no niyam.
ch: 我們在同一間學校讀書。
en: We study in the same school.

ab: Maolah kako aci kaka^ ako a romadiw.
en: Both my brother and I like to sing.

ab: Maolah kako a midangoy. I pipahanhanan a romi’ad, makomod ko paro^ no loma’ niyam a midangoy.
ch: 我喜歡游泳，放假的時候，我們全家會一起去游泳。
en: I like swimming. During the holidays, our whole family go swimming together.

ab: Maolah kako a misaidang i cimacimaan, manga’ay kami a makomod a romadiw ato midangoy.
ch: 我喜歡認識新朋友，我們可以一起唱歌和游泳。
en: I love meeting new people, we can sing and swim together.
